health.narrative: Best-in-class growth+margin combo (Rule-of-X ~110). Net cash, no debt. Fundamentals are anomalously good; the entire trade has migrated to valuation. FY25 revenue ~$4.475B (+56%), adj op margin >40%, FCF ~$2.1B.

pre_announcement_drift.implied_signal: Defensive positioning. YTD -13.8%, -31% from $207 ATH. Crowded bear sentiment + 'maximum disagreement' headlines. Setup is the inverse of October 2025 (which was 'long-and-strong into print' that delivered T+1 -8%). Asymmetry now favors a base-or-better resolution.

scenario.beat_case: 30% probability. Rev >$1.62B, FY26 raised to $7.45B+, US-Comm guide >$3.25B. Expected T+1 +12% to +18%, T+5 mid-target $164 (+14%).
scenario.base_case: 45% probability. Rev $1.55-$1.62B, FY26 raised to $7.30-$7.40B. Expected T+1 -2% to +6%, T+5 mid-target $148 (+3%). Probability-weighted T+5 expected return for the full distribution = +2.3%.
scenario.miss_case: Mild bear (18%): rev $1.54-$1.56B, FY26 unchanged. T+5 mid-target $130 (-10%). Tail miss (7%): rev <$1.54B or US-Comm decel. T+5 mid-target $117 (-19%).

risks.label: Valuation compression
risks.rationale: Fwd P/E 109x vs SaaS peer median 18x. Multiple is dominant near-term return driver; any growth-durability doubt triggers 25-35% derate.

risks.label: FY26 guide under-raise
risks.rationale: Buy-side whisper $7.4B+. Reiterating $7.18-$7.20B guide alone = T+1 -10%+ outcome based on Q1'25 / Q3'25 precedent.

risks.label: US-Commercial deceleration
risks.rationale: +137% YoY in Q4'25 is a once-in-cycle hard comp. Sequential deceleration is mathematically required; narrative-sensitive.

risks.label: SBC / share count dilution
risks.rationale: Stock-based comp ~20% of revenue; share count rises 3-5%/yr; no material buyback offset.

risks.label: Insider 10b5-1 selling
risks.rationale: Karp, Cohen, executive officers continue scheduled sales. Not new but sentiment headwind on weak tape.

risks.label: Software-sector beta
risks.rationale: NOW/IBM April 2026 misses dragged PLTR -8%. Highest-multiple software = highest beta in derate cycles.

risks.label: Government concentration / political risk
risks.rationale: US Gov ~55% revenue; recurring DOJ/FTC scrutiny on data practices; political heat headlines pre-print.

risks.label: No buyback or dividend support
risks.rationale: Pure growth-multiple stock; no capital-return safety net during valuation compression.
